title: Investigation of the room-temperature photoelectron spectroscopy of type-II Weyl semimetal candidate WTe2

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports room-temperature photoelectron spectroscopy measurements on WTe2 to investigate its electronic structure as a type-II Weyl semimetal candidate.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: Main findings are presented in the paper itself; additional data are not publicly downloadable and must be requested from the authors.

dataset_characterization.data_availability_statement: The authors declare that the main data supporting the findings of this study are available within the paper. Extra data are available from the corresponding authors upon request.
dataset_characterization.data_organization: The paper states that the main data are included within the paper, and any extra data are available from the corresponding authors upon request. No external repository, publisher-hosted source data, or supplementary files were found.
